text: As I leave this space, I find myself caught between relief and curiosity. The emptiness of the first room seems to echo a kind of closure—an ending of some engagement, an exhale after presence. Yet, stepping into the vibrant world of R+D, I'm struck by a sense of restless possibility. Surrounded by signs of innovation and the written reflections on uncertainty, I feel as though I've exited the familiar and crossed into a landscape shaped by questions rather than answers. Part freed, part uncertain—a philosopher adrift in the echo between departure and discovery.
